pr.title: Ultimate recurrent: 21 techniques — depth recurrence, novel ops

output.summary: Depth-recurrent transformer reuses three shared layers over three passes with adaptive controls, compression-aware loss, and novel recurrence/encoding ops.
techniques: Depth recurrence+adaptive control scales shared across passes
Compression-aware auxiliary loss with U-Net skips and GRU carries
Novel recurrence/encoding (Gradient Memory, Temporal Difference, Resonant Position Encoding)
